description: 14. Check the reputation of a file
examples:
Command Example
!file file=84c82835a5d21bbcf75a61706d8ab549 threshold=LOW
Context Example
{
"DBotScore": {
"Vendor": "TruSTAR",
"Indicator": "84c82835a5d21bbcf75a61706d8ab549",
"Score": 3,
name: file

outputs.description: File SHA-256 File.Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The indicator we tested DBotScore.Type The type of the indicator
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor

outputs.description: Indicator value TruSTAR.File.Whitelisted Is the indicator on allow list
outputs.name: TruSTAR.File.Value
